stemHtml: During the design stage, an aircraft manufacturer chooses to place a metal rod on the fuselage, sticking out into the airflow, that can be easily viewed from the flight deck. How might this rod be used?

options.a: The pilots should monitor whether the rod is still present after a suspected birdstrike to assess aircraft damage.
options.b: The rod is an aerodynamic device to aid stall characteristics.
options.c: The pilots should monitor the rod for ice accretion.
options.d: The rod is a static pressure probe, it should be monitored at all times to make sure it is not blocked.
